Add file attachments and improve UI with icon library migration

## File Attachment System
- Implement complete file upload/attachment functionality

- Create FileUpload and MessageAttachment components
- Add file metadata storage and retrieval endpoints
- Support file attachments in chat messages with visual previews
- Add shared constants for file handling (max size, allowed types)

## Icon Library Migration
- Replace all inline SVG components with lucide-react icons
- Move lucide-react dependency from root to frontend package
- Refactor 7 components: InputArea, MessageItem, MessageAttachment, 
  FileUpload, ModelSelector, ThemeToggle, UserMenu
- Remove ~300 lines of inline SVG code for cleaner, maintainable components
- Consistent icon styling across the application

## Model Attribution Feature
- Add model name display to AI messages (similar to Open WebUI)
- Update database schema (v5) to store model with each message
- Show model name during streaming (real-time display)
- Add visual indicator with CPU icon for model attribution
- Preserve model information in message persistence layer

## Code Quality Improvements
- Add comprehensive comments to MessageItem for better code navigation
- Remove unused CSS file (saved-ideas-do-no-delete.css)
- Improve message handling with better model tracking
- Enhanced database migrations with proper upgrade paths
